seoTitle: Mount Sturt vs Mount Surround — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Sturt and Mount Surround. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Sturt vs Mount Surround: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Sturt and Mount Surround.
heading: Mount Sturt vs Mount Surround — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Sturt, Queensland and Mount Surround, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Surround has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Mount Sturt (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Sturt or Mount Surround safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Sturt has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Mount Surround scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Sturt scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Surround scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Sturt or Mount Surround?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Surround has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
